subject: Three small insectoid-humanoid blue figures in aggressive crouched stances — Cell Jr. offspring
description: Three small figures fill the frame in a group composition, each in a crouched aggressive fighting stance. The figures are blue-and-black in coloring with insectoid-humanoid proportions — smaller and more compact than a standard adult humanoid, consistent with Cell offspring. Their poses are varied: one crouching forward, one angled left, one partially obscured behind the others. The background is a dark teal-black with faint energy lighting. No individual expressions are clearly readable at this scale.
foreground: three small blue-black insectoid-humanoid figures in fighting stances
background: dark teal-black with faint energy glow
